message:
Add hyperlink support and improve text rendering infrastructure

Frame hyperlink support (frame.rs):
- Add optional LinkRegistry reference to Frame
- Implement register_link() method for OSC 8 hyperlinks
- Add set_links() for runtime link registry injection

Program rendering fix (program.rs):
- Fix borrow checker issue by scoping Frame lifetime properly
- Pass link registry to Frame during render phase
- Extract buffer before dropping Frame to release borrows

Text hyperlink API (text.rs):
- Add optional link field to Span for URL storage
- Add link() builder method for fluent hyperlink setup
- Preserve link in into_owned() and truncation operations

TextView Rope migration (view.rs):
- Replace String backing with Rope for large text efficiency
- Add max_scroll(), scroll_to_top(), scroll_to_bottom() helpers
- Handle trailing newlines in line iteration

Paragraph horizontal scroll (paragraph.rs):
- Use draw_text_span_scrolled for partial span rendering
- Properly handle local_scroll for clipped content
- Remove dead_code allow now that function is used

StatusLine spacer improvements (status_line.rs):
- Fix spacer width calculation to distribute available space
- Skip separators adjacent to spacers
- Add spacer_count() and items_fixed_width() helpers
- Add test for spacer expansion behavior

Test stability (headless.rs):
- Use timestamp + thread ID for unique temp directory names
- Prevents race conditions in parallel test execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
